title: Critical and academic reception to Shin Evangelion
display_title: Critical and academic reception to Shin Evangelion
wikitext: []: Critical and academic reception to Shin Evangelion             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Mar 20, 2021 12:52 pm I thought it might be better to collate the emerging critical and academic reception to Shin Eva here for referecences' sake, instead of discussing it in disparate threads. This twitter thread is collating new reviews, apparently: https://twitter.com/i/events/1372795417407021057 Extremely positive audience reception on eiga.com (a sort of Japanese IMDB), according to NanJ on March 9th: http://yaraon-blog.com/archives/192015 Filmmarks (similar to eiga) has apparently has Shin Eva with the all time highest first day satisfaction score SPOILER: Show

Article: Critical and academic reception to Shin Evangelion
[]: Critical and academic reception to Shin Evangelion             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Mar 20, 2021 12:52 pm I thought it might be better to collate the emerging critical and academic reception to Shin Eva here for referecences' sake, instead of discussing it in disparate threads. This twitter thread is collating new reviews, apparently: https://twitter.com/i/events/1372795417407021057 Extremely positive audience reception on eiga.com (a sort of Japanese IMDB), according to NanJ on March 9th: http://yaraon-blog.com/archives/192015 Filmmarks (similar to eiga) has apparently has Shin Eva with the all time highest first day satisfaction score SPOILER: Show
